mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_metrics_agg_1m ( instance_id, database_id, collected_at, total_queries, select_queries, insert_queries, update_queries, delete_queries, other_queries, avg_execution_time_ms, max_execution_time_ms, avg_planning_time_ms, total_io_blocks, avg_io_blocks, slow_query_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{m.instanceId}, #{m.databaseId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.totalQueries}, #{m.selectQueries}, #{m.insertQueries}, #{m.updateQueries}, #{m.deleteQueries}, #{m.otherQueries}, #{m.avgExecutionTimeMs}, #{m.maxExecutionTimeMs}, #{m.avgPlanningTimeMs}, #{m.totalIoBlocks}, #{m.avgIoBlocks}, #{m.slowQueryCount}, NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, database_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_queries = EXCLUDED.total_queries, select_queries = EXCLUDED.select_queries, insert_queries = EXCLUDED.insert_queries, update_queries = EXCLUDED.update_queries, delete_queries = EXCLUDED.delete_queries, other_queries = EXCLUDED.other_queries, avg_execution_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_execution_time_ms, max_execution_time_ms = EXCLUDED.max_execution_time_ms, avg_planning_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_planning_time_ms, total_io_blocks = EXCLUDED.total_io_blocks, avg_io_blocks = EXCLUDED.avg_io_blocks, slow_query_count = EXCLUDED.slow_query_count, created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, select_queries AS selectQueries, insert_queries AS insertQueries, update_queries AS updateQueries, delete_queries AS deleteQueries FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, avg_execution_time_ms AS avgExecutionTimeMs FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, avg_io_blocks AS avgIoBlocks FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, slow_query_count AS slowQueryCount FROM query_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at
